artifactId.description: Stable source-package artifact identity. Format: vaultui_<folder-name>_<26-char ULID>.

match.description: Developer-facing registry binding intent. Each binding targets chainId plus a factoryAddress, one vaultAddresses entry, or one or more tokenAddresses entries. At least one binding must include tokenAddresses as the manifest-declared test token source for vault:check/e2e.

bindings.description: Explicit factory-scoped, single-Vault, or token-scoped binding targets. One UI artifact can share logic across multiple deployment targets. At least one binding must include tokenAddresses for Workbench/e2e test coverage. Duplicate runtime binding keys are also blocked by vault:check.

chainId.description: EVM chain ID, for example 56 for BNB Chain mainnet or 97 for BNB Chain testnet.

factoryAddress.description: Non-zero factory contract address on this chain for factory-scoped custom UI binding.

vaultAddresses.description: Vault address list for this binding. In no-factory mode this may contain exactly one Vault address and participates in preview/runtime matching.

tokenAddresses.description: Binding-scoped token CA list. Every manifest must include at least one real deployed ERC20 token address under a binding for Workbench/e2e test coverage. In no-factory mode this may also be used as the binding target itself and may contain multiple token addresses.

externalContracts.description: Optional review declaration for fixed contract targets that are not the runtime token, Vault, factory, or binding-scoped token/vault addresses. Each entry must include the contract address and a human-readable label.

i18n.description: Supported locale list. vault:check validates exactly these locales against i18n.json.

endpoints.description: Optional non-oracle external endpoint declarations. Use a single HTTPS URL string or an array of HTTPS URL strings for fast review/checker allowlisting.

externalFrames.description: Optional reviewed display-only iframe declarations. Only TradingView, DexScreener, and CoinGecko Terminal provider URLs are supported; each src must be a complete static HTTPS URL with fixed query params.

address.description: Fixed external contract address reviewed for this binding.

label.description: Human-readable review label, for example Reward distributor.

id.description: Stable lowercase kebab-case frame id referenced by ReviewedFrame.

src.description: Complete static iframe URL with fixed query params. Runtime query construction is not allowed.

title.description: Human-readable accessibility title for the embedded frame.
